name: AWS Security Hub
description: This app integrates with AWS Security Hub to ingest findings

parameters.name: container_id
parameters.description: Container IDs to limit the ingestion to

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Start of the time range, in epoch time (milliseconds)

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: End of the time range, in epoch time (milliseconds)

parameters.name: container_count
parameters.description: Maximum number of container records to query for

parameters.name: artifact_count
parameters.description: Maximum number of artifact records to query for

parameters.name: credentials
parameters.description: Assumed role credentials

actions.name: Get Findings
actions.description: Lists and describes Security Hub aggregated findings that are specified by a single filter attribute

parameters.name: resource_id
parameters.description: The canonical identifier for the given resource type

parameters.name: resource_ec2_ipv4_addresses
parameters.description: Comma-separated IPv4 addresses associated with the instance

parameters.name: network_source_ipv4
parameters.description: Comma-separated source IPv4 addresses of network-related information about a finding
contains: aws security hub network source ip

parameters.name: network_source_mac
parameters.description: The source media access control (MAC) address of network-related information about a finding

parameters.name: resource_region
parameters.description: The canonical AWS external region name where this resource is located

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of findings to be fetched

parameters.name: is_archived
parameters.description: Flag to fetch the archived findings

parameters.name: credentials
parameters.description: Assumed role credentials

actions.name: Get Related Findings
actions.description: Lists Security Hub aggregated findings that are specified by filter attributes

parameters.name: findings_id
parameters.description: Identifier of security finding

parameters.name: credentials
parameters.description: Assumed role credentials

actions.name: Archive Findings
actions.description: Archive the AWS Security Hub aggregated findings specified by the filter attributes

parameters.name: findings_id
parameters.description: Identifier of security finding

parameters.name: note
parameters.description: The text of a note

parameters.name: overwrite
parameters.description: Check this box to overwrite the existing notes, otherwise, notes will be appended to existing notes

parameters.name: credentials
parameters.description: Assumed role credentials

actions.name: Unarchive Findings
actions.description: Unarchive the AWS Security Hub aggregated findings specified by the filter attributes

parameters.name: findings_id
parameters.description: Identifier of security finding

parameters.name: note
parameters.description: The text of a note

parameters.name: overwrite
parameters.description: Check this box to overwrite the existing notes, otherwise, notes will be appended to existing notes

parameters.name: credentials
parameters.description: Assumed role credentials

actions.name: Add Note
actions.description: Add Note to the AWS Security Hub aggregated findings specified by the filter attributes

parameters.name: findings_id
parameters.description: Identifier of security finding

parameters.name: note
parameters.description: The text of a note

parameters.name: overwrite
parameters.description: Check this box to overwrite the existing notes, otherwise, notes will be appended to existing notes

parameters.name: credentials
parameters.description: Assumed role credentials
